title: Traveling with Kyle - Indonesia Part 4/4, Australia Part 1

transcript.text: All right so I was in Bali and I boo booed for three weeks and I was I noticed
There was a courses in miracles study group and I had actually read that book
Over the course of a whole year that is my German Reiki teacher named Peter gave
To me and so I went there and then there was this American guy talking about it
With some English or American girl he lived in a really cool house he had his
Whole house to himself and his backyard so we were talking about that for a
Couple days and and then I go back to Ubud and watch movies at these
Restaurants and anyway it's a cool place to wind down and then I got on I got on
A boat and took a boat another boat days journey to Timur if I hadn't done that
Trip again I probably should have stopped in Komodo where the Komodo dragons
Are and seeing some other cool islands where they have the volcanic you know
Turquoise lakes and stuff but I didn't do that I just took the boat straight into
Timur and had another crazy experience on the boat I stayed on on the deck of the
Boat and I bought some weed in the blue from some Indonesian guy and so I was
Smoking in my sleeping bag on the deck so I was high a little time and hanging out
In this little bar with these crazy Indonesians this one kid young kid who
Was just he would that they're off the wall just babbling and Indonesian I know he's
Saying but then everybody would laugh and he was like making fun of me because he's
Pointing at me and like mocking me and and they they wanted me to stay at their
House and we got off the boat but I decided to just go and stay to hotel I'm
Getting on and off a boat in Indonesia is kind of an experience when I first got on
The boat for some reason they didn't line the boat up right so they could only
Open up the door like halfway so people have to crawl in and then I got off the
Boat and everybody thought that one side was going to be the exit so everybody
Crowds together jam-packed and then the other side open so everybody crawls over
There and I had my bicycle and people were pushing my bike into some guy in
Front of me and he thought it was me and I was just trying to not piss anybody off
But I got on my bike and rode down to some to a hotel and stayed there and booked a
Booked a flight to Darwin Australia so I was very excited to be in Darwin because
For the last what was it a couple of months or something and actually for the
Last like year or more than a year I was in poor countries and countries that
Didn't speak English and here was my opportunity to go back to it first world
Country where they speak English so I got on the plane and flew into Darwin and the
Landing in Darwin was very interesting because the plane it was on Indonesian
Airlines and the plane was rocking like this as it was landing in Darwin I at one
Point thought maybe like are we gonna crash but he managed to get it flat right
Before we landed and we I landed and got my stuff got my bike put the wheels on it
And was riding down the road and that was very exciting one of the most exciting
Times of my life riding down the road in Australia just nice roads not too much
Traffic nice cars everybody's speaking English and just flat and kind of
Sparsely not like jungly where you can walk anywhere you want you don't you're not a
Slave to the roads too much foliage everywhere and I rode into Darwin and hung
Out there Darwin is kind of an interesting place because it's a small town it's very
Touristy and all the tourists are high school age high school graduate age
English kids so I guess when English kids graduate high school they all go to
Australia and drive around Australia and they all go in these big groups so it
Was really cliquish I stayed in this hotel that was huge and then like this
Cafeteria like place there's all these groups of kids and their own little
Groups but I met I was hanging out with some Dutch kid who was like a soccer
Player we went to a bar and it was it was a bar filled with nothing but on the on the
Pedestrian mall filled with nothing but a tourist like English tourists and they
Had like these strip contests there where they get like English tourists girls they
Play music and they'd see like which girl would take off the most their most
Clothes and whoever did one and they would like they got totally topless and
Anyways that was the only place like that I was I was I was there for a day or two
Because I I I had to buy stuff for my bicycle I bought stuff like these water
Bottle holders to hold like six two-liter water bottles and yeah I think that's
Basically all I bought and then extra parts and stuff and then I started
Riding south towards Alice Springs um it took me 11 days to get to Alice Springs
From Darwin when I first left Darwin I thought that I was going to be able to
Ride my bike for 24 hours straight but I made it like 12 hours and then I got
Tired I got drowsy and so I would just I just sleep on the side of the road I
Would every few miles there's a place in the side of the road where you can get
Food like a barbecue and it's kind of expensive but and I had a big appetite
So I ate a lot of it but um it was fun the first I think 12 or 15 miles
Leaving Darwin I had my own they had a bike path so I had my own road to
Myself which was really cool and I had we do that I brought with me from
Indonesia and in my butt so I don't worry I was safe but I made it like halfway
There to Alice Springs and I ran out of weed and I got up one morning and I'm
Riding down the road and I'm like oh I think I saw a couple like American couple
Or something and they saw me riding for their direction they came to my side and
They wanted to talk to me and every couple days you see a bike and these guys
Would come to my ride and they wanted to like talk to you about their tour and
Everything but it was my first day without weed and I'm riding down the road
Thinking to myself oh man this sucks no weed because it was my first day without it
And I looked down and I see a pipe a metal pipe so I picked it up and I looked at it
It was totally resonated so I scraped it and it this thing kept me totally stoned
All the way into Darwin and I was pretty much had you know run out of it right
When I got to Darwin and I rolled into Darwin and I saw a few of these
Aborigine guys so I asked this guy where I could buy us some weed and he goes oh yeah
Follow me I know this guy so I went over to this bar and he introduced me to
These old like 55 year old Australian guys who were there sitting around
Drinking beer and so they said oh yeah you know I sell weed I'll sell you some so I
Sat down with them and and I was I got a room at this really big a hostel hotel
I'm in a bunk room and lots of English tourists there but I didn't really talk
To any of them but anyways I hung out with these English these Australian guys
All day long for three days and they just that's all they did I don't know what
They did for money I guess they were seasonal workers or something or they
Just weren't working at that time but yeah we're just drinking beer all day long
And they just take turns buying each other beer so so be like this guy's
Turning that guy's turning them the men my turn to buy everybody we're beer and it
Was it was Victoria Victoria beer VB Victoria's best or something like that
Was what everybody's drunk drunk wasn't Foster's I guess that's the piss beer
That went down there but uh so yeah I'm hanging out drinking beer with these guys
For three days in this bar and you know in this Aborigine guy who introduced me with
Like hanging out with us and then there was this younger Aborigine guy who was
Hanging out with him too who would talk to me but I barely understood what he was
Saying the Aborigines are really hard to understand because they talk like this and
They're really very pronounced their words and they speak really quiet really low and
He didn't have any front teeth and he was explaining to me that I guess that's the
Rite of passage down there as they would bash out their front teeth and then
They're a man and he's telling me how like there were like rivalries or something
In between that reason I don't really understand what he's talking about but
He's he loved talking to me talking to me for a long time but uh whoops I'm out of time
